calendar.matters:
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Nov-17-2010 Text Ruling

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Nov-17-2010 Text Ruling

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-01-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner: Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Michael Rossoff, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Community Housing Partnership, a California nonprofit corporation.
Daivd Kim, Property Supervisor, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Bulfrano Deaquino-Villanueva.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on September 23, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Community Housing Partnership, a California nonprofit corporation, and against defendant Bulfranco Deaquino-Villanueva as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $51.46.
Attorney Fees - $0.00.
Costs - Waived.

Total - $51.46.

Additionally, plaintiff Community Housing Partnership, a California nonprofit corporation is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 684 Ellis Street, #403, San Francisco, CA 94109. The lease is forfeited.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-01-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-28-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk D Feinberg ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Community Housing Partnership David Kim, Mgr., present
Attorney, Micharel Rossoff, Esq., appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Bulfrano Deaquino-Villanueva, is present.
Attorney, Jonathan DeGoodyer, Esq. representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Barbara Anscher, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.

This case is not settled, the trial date of NOV-1-2010 remains.
